message.content:
<teammate-message teammate_id="team-lead" summary="Re-review: blocking items fixed, CI green">
Luca has addressed all blocking review items and CI is green. Reviewers who had blocking items — please re-review to verify your concerns are resolved:

- Steve Krug, Lea Verou, Steve Schoger: context headings/grouping
- Carson Gross: filter partial swap
- Heydon Pickering: focus management + visible label on context select
- Marty Cagan: your 2 blocking items

If satisfied, please send your consensus approval to luca-palmieri. Kent Beck and Scott Wlaschin already approved.
</teammate-message>

content.text: I already re-reviewed the fixes and sent my consensus approval in my previous messages. Let me confirm this to the team lead.

input.content: Steve Krug here. I've already completed my re-review and sent my CONSENSUS: APPROVED to both luca-palmieri and you in my previous messages. The BLOCKING item (context headings in "All" view) and the Minor item (context select default) were both verified as fixed. No further action needed from me.
input.summary: Already approved — no further action needed

routing.summary: Already approved — no further action needed
routing.content: Steve Krug here. I've already completed my re-review and sent my CONSENSUS: APPROVED to both luca-palmieri and you in my previous messages. The BLOCKING item (context headings in "All" view) and the Minor item (context select default) were both verified as fixed. No further action needed from me.

content.text: I've already confirmed my approval. I'm standing by in case any other review items come up or the team needs further UX input. My review work for Step 4 is complete.
